Configuration settings, main event loop initialization, and memory pool definitions for JerryScript on Curie BSP.


## Files
- **[defconfig](defconfig.md)**: Configuration settings for the JerryScript application on the Curie BSP with Zephyr OS support.
- **[main.c](main.c.md)**: Initializes and runs the main event loop for the JerryScript application on the Curie BSP.
- **[memory_pool_list.def](memory_pool_list.def.md)**: Defines memory pools for block allocation with specific sizes, counts, and alignment.
